author: Eurogamer
text:
As the Lies of P sequel enters full-scale development, developer Neowiz says it's working on another Soulslike and a narrative RPG

Lies of P continues to be one of the most celebrated Soulslikes made outside of FromSoftware, and we've known for over two years a sequel was happening. Now, we've learned it's entered the "vertical slice" stage.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
MPs accuse GTA 6 developer Rockstar of obstructing legal processes, as battle over 'union-busting' dismissals continues

Three Scottish Labour Members of Parliament have accused Grand Theft Auto 6 developer Rockstar of obstructing legal processes over alleged union-busting with "silence and closed doors".

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Amidst Xbox boycotts and media pressure, Microsoft reportedly restructures Israeli office after internal investigation into ethical violations

Microsoft's investigation into the ethical conduct of its Israeli office, and its work with the Israeli Ministry of Defense - particularly in relation to storing user data on Microsoft's servers - has resulted in the departure of the general manager there and several other managers. This is according to news publication Globes, which also heard that for the time being, Microsoft's rudderless Israeli office will be led by Microsoft France.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Tekken director Katsuhiro Harada is back, but this time at his own studio backed by old fighting game rival SNK

Katsuhiro Harada, having only last year announced his departure from Bandai Namco and the Tekken team he'd been a part of for over 20 years, has founded a new studio.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Sega's "Super Game" has been cancelled, but revivals of classics like Crazy Taxi and Golden Axe are still moving forward

Sega's latest financial report has confirmed the cancellation of the "Super Game" project it announced almost four years ago, as it tries to pivot away from live-service endeavours.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
"Our two franchises complement each other perfectly" - Alan Wake 2 invades Phasmophobia in a new three-week crossover event

If you are part of the Venn diagram overlap of people who love both the nightmare-inducing ghosts of Phasmophobia and the surreal world of troubled author Alan Wake, then good news because a three-week collaboration between the two horror series begins today, 12th May.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Nintendo promises a strong roster of Switch 2 games to counterbalance the recent price increases

Nintendo has promised to provide "a robust software line-up to enhance the Switch 2 ownership value" following the Switch 2 price increase (from $449.99 to $499.99) announced last week.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Indiana Jones and the Great Circle's Nintendo Switch 2 port is finally here and it holds up pretty well

Indiana Jones and the Great Circle's long-awaited Nintendo Switch 2 port has finally arrived, and I'm pleased to report it's pretty good.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Valve might be making 512GB and 2TB versions of its new Steam Machine, despite AI-driven memory shortages

Valve might be making four versions of its new Steam Machine - including a 512GB and 2TB option - if a software update to the Steam Controller's reservation system is to be believed.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
"My fear doesn't matter" - Troy Baker reflects on recreating the opening to Raiders of the Lost Ark as Indiana Jones and the Great Circle arrives on Switch 2

I can still clearly remember the first time I watched Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark with my brothers. I was young and nestled between them, and I felt safe in the knowledge they would protect me from anything too scary for five-year-old me. I also had my teddy just in case. I needn't have worried, though. Within moments, I was transfixed, partly by the sweltering Peruvian jungle but mostly by the handsome man in a fedora with a whip. I wanted to be just like him. I wanted his confidence, his strength, his sense of adventure, and I wanted his wardrobe too.

Read more

author: Eurogamer
text:
Fallout TV show season three casts Breaking Bad's Aaron Paul, so of course everyone wants him to play a scientist

Filming for the third season of Amazon's acclaimed Fallout show is expected to begin this month, and ahead of that, we've just got our first bit of casting news. Actor Aaron Paul has joined the cast of Fallout, alongside returning faces Ella Purnell and Walton Goggins.

Read more
